chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI M.A. No. 150 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing / Case. 1. For hearing of CMA No. 8069/2025. 2. For orders on Office Objections. 3. For order on CMA No. 8070/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 5. For hearing of CMA No. 8071/2025. 02.04.2026. M/s. Dildar Ahmed Maitlo, and Akbar Ali Memon, Advocates for the Appellant. Mr. Muhammad Imran Shamshi, Advocate for SECP. ********** Learned counsel appearing on behalf of the Appellant submits that the Respondents / SECP have passed an Order dated 09.12.2025, whereby the Review Application filed by the Appellant will be considered by them. Accordingly, the purpose of instant Appeal has been served, hence the same is disposed of alongwith listed applications. JUDGE AYAZ
